title: わたし、本気でがんばる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is still in low spirits several days after
her friend confronted her in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower, seeing her depressed state, calls out
to her and offers advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower tells her that as long as she holds
onto her dream of winning, she's fine just as she
is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those words give Haru Urara confidence, and she
returns to being her usual peppy self.
